title: Java Optional Or Else
description: Practice Optional, filter, map, and orElse.

completionChecks.prompt: What does displayName hold when user is null?
completionChecks.explanation: Optional.ofNullable(null) produces an empty Optional, so filter and map are skipped and orElse supplies the fallback "guest".

completionChecks.prompt: When does the orElse("guest") fallback supply the value?
choices: When user is null, fails the active filter, or maps to a null name, leaving the Optional empty
Only when User::name throws at runtime
Always, because orElse runs after every chain
completionChecks.explanation: orElse supplies its argument only when the Optional is empty, which happens if user is null, the active filter removes it, or the mapped name is null.

completionChecks.prompt: What does displayName become if user is non-null but User::active returns false?
completionChecks.explanation: The filter removes inactive users from the Optional pipeline, so map is skipped and orElse returns the fallback.
